    def test_add_new_card_from_change_payment(page: Page):
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Test Data
        # ==========================================================
    
        base_url = "https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login"
    
        username = "CSASINHN"
        password = "GOLD950"
    
        first_name = "Kratika"
        last_name = "Sharma"
    
        card_number = "4000100020003000"
        cvv = "143"
    
        expiry_month = "08"
        expiry_year = "2027"
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 1 : Login
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.goto(base_url)
    
        page.locator("div").nth(5).click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="User ID"
        ).fill(username)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Password"
        ).fill(password)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Login"
        ).click()
    
        page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("main")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 2 : Open Orders
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "complementary"
        ).get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Orders",
            exact=True
        ).click()
    
        page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("grid")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 3 : Open First Available Order Dynamically
        # ==========================================================
    
        order_buttons = page.get_by_role("grid").get_by_role("button")
    
        page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
    
        expect(order_buttons.first).to_be_visible()
    
        selected_order = None
    
        for i in range(order_buttons.count()):
    
            text = order_buttons.nth(i).inner_text().strip()
    
            if re.fullmatch(r"Y\d+", text):
    
                selected_order = text
    
                order_buttons.nth(i).click()
    
                break
    
        assert selected_order is not None, (
            "No Order ID found."
        )
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_title(selected_order)
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 4 : Open Change Payment
        # ==========================================================
    
        change_payment = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Change Payment"
        )
    
        expect(change_payment).to_be_visible()
    
        change_payment.click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 5 : Click Add New Payment
        # ==========================================================
    
        add_payment = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="+ Add New Payment"
        )
    
        expect(add_payment).to_be_visible()
    
        # If Add New Payment is disabled, remove the existing payment
        if not add_payment.is_enabled():
    
            print("Add New Payment is disabled. Removing existing payment...")
    
            delete_button = page.get_by_role(
                "button",
                name="Delete"
            )
    
            expect(delete_button).to_be_visible()
    
            delete_button.click()
    
            remove_button = page.get_by_role(
                "button",
                name="Remove"
            )
    
            expect(remove_button).to_be_visible()
    
            remove_button.click()
    
            page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    
            # Wait until Add New Payment becomes enabled
            expect(add_payment).to_be_enabled()
    
        # Click Add New Payment
        add_payment.click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 6 : Select Credit Card Payment
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Select payment type"
        ).click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Credit Card Payment"
        ).click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 7 : Enter Card Details
        # ==========================================================
    
        card_frame = page.locator(
            '[id^="add-payment-cs-num"] iframe'
        ).content_frame
    
        cvv_frame = page.locator(
            '[id^="add-payment-cs-cvv"] iframe'
        ).content_frame
    
        expect(
            card_frame.get_by_role(
                "textbox",
                name="Card number"
            )
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        card_frame.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Card number"
        ).fill(card_number)
    
        cvv_frame.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Card security code"
        ).fill(cvv)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="First Name *"
        ).fill(first_name)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Last Name *"
        ).fill(last_name)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Month"
        ).click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name=expiry_month
        ).click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Year"
        ).click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name=expiry_year
        ).click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 8 : Add Card
        # ==========================================================
    
        add_button = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Add",
            exact=True
        )
    
        expect(add_button).to_be_enabled()
    
        add_button.click()

    async def _wait_for_load_state_impl(
        self, state: DocumentLoadState = None, timeout: float = None
    ) -> None:
        if not state:
            state = "load"
        if state not in ("load", "domcontentloaded", "networkidle", "commit"):
            raise Error(
                "state: expected one of (load|domcontentloaded|networkidle|commit)"
            )
        waiter = self._setup_navigation_waiter("wait_for_load_state", timeout)
    
        if state in self._load_states:
            waiter.log(f'  not waiting, "{state}" event already fired')
            # TODO: align with upstream
            waiter._fulfill(None)
        else:
    
            def handle_load_state_event(actual_state: str) -> bool:
                waiter.log(f'"{actual_state}" event fired')
                return actual_state == state
    
            waiter.wait_for_event(
                self._event_emitter,
                "loadstate",
                handle_load_state_event,
            )
